title: Better Movement
description: The "Better Movement" mod provides greater control over movement.
body:
## Better Movement mod
This mod **simplifies movement** and gives you **more control** while walking.

**Imagine a situation**: you’re moving forward by holding down the W key, but then you press and hold S.

In the vanilla game, you’d simply stop—but this mod fixes that issue, allowing you to move backward as intended.
![z](https://i.imgur.com/FFrcWwa.gif)

**Now regarding control**: in the vanilla game, while moving—say, left and right—you’d move fairly smoothly, but not continuously.
With the mod, this changes, and you get nearly seamless, uninterrupted movement almost all the time!
